int steps = 0;

while (n != 0) {

   int highest = -1;

   for (int i = 30; i >=0; --i) {

      if ((n & (1 << i)) == 0) continue;

            highest = i;

            break;

         }

      }

   }

   if (highest != -1) {

      steps +=1;

      n ^= (1 << highest);

   } else {

      steps +=1;

      n ^= 1;

}

return steps;

      n ^= (1 << highest);

      steps +=1;

      n ^= 1;

}

return steps;
